title: Luke Whitington: ‘Ancient toil’, and ‘A distant visitor’
description: Ancient toil The swollen-girthed willow tree Trunk and boughs wrenched Right around in struggle A posture frozen in a soundless opera to survive. The last evening’s sunlight is falling like Ornate golden wounds Across twisted, uplifted arms of bark Rising from a lurching, heroic trunk I move around, snapping, capturing instants Feeling like a thief [...]

title: Spider webs on Mars: Nasa rover discovers clues about existence of ancient life
description: NEW DELHI: Nasa’s Mars rover has spent six months exploring a strange, web-like landscape that could change what we know about how long life may have existed on the Red Planet. The space agency’s Curiosity rover has been crawling across one of the most visually striking regions on Mars: a vast stretch of low, criss-crossing [...]

title: Two Ancient Nations Open A New Chapter: Israel's Leading Daily On PM Modi's Visit
description: (MENAFN - IANS) Tel Aviv, Feb 25 (IANS) As Prime Minister Narendra Modi embarked on his two-day Israel visit, a leading Israeli daily on Wednesday rolled out a warm and symbolic welcome on its front ...

title: Wyoming lawmakers: Fossil fuels need taxpayer dollars to 'dominate'
description: This story is part of a collaborative legislative initiative by WyoFile, Wyoming Tribune Eagle, The Sheridan Press and Jackson Hole News&Guide to deliver comprehensive coverage of Wyoming’s 2026 budget session.
